items.explanation: Third-person singular present indefinite of eszik is eszik (same as the stem for this verb).

items.prompt: Present, indefinite: mi (we) — olvasni (to read) → present stem olvas-
items.explanation: First-person plural present indefinite uses the -unk ending: olvasunk.

items.prompt: Present, definite: te (you) — ír (to write) + definite object

items.explanation: Third-person plural present indefinite of jön is jönnek.

items.prompt: Present, definite: ő (he/she) — lát (to see) + definite object
items.explanation: Third-person singular present definite of lát is látja.
